hero.lead: Send a photo of your product. Jaarle creates your poster, your story and your sales copy — ready for Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and WhatsApp.
hero.proof: Already used by merchants in Dakar, Thiès and Touba

how.title: Three steps. Zero design skills.
how.desc: No Photoshop, no designer needed. Jaarle handles everything, from visual to copy.
how.s1d: A photo taken with your phone is enough. Add the product name and price, or just talk to Jaarle.
how.s2d: Standard or Advanced — the AI analyzes your product and chooses the style, backdrop and colors itself. The tier only determines how rich the result is.
how.s3d: Get your poster, story and sales copy in one click. Download or share directly.

preview.title: The app, screen by screen
preview.desc: From raw photo to published campaign — with an AI that shows its work in real time.
preview.uploadHint: JPG, PNG — or take a photo directly
preview.tierNote: No style to pick: the AI analyzes your product and composes the backdrop, layout and colors itself. The tier only determines how rich the result is (badge, contact info, highlights).

pricing.title: Pay only for what you use
pricing.desc: No mandatory subscription, no expiring credits. Pay with Wave or Orange Money.

dashboard.title: A dashboard that speaks FCFA, not credits
dashboard.desc: Every merchant sees exactly what they spent and created — no abstract unit to decode.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Launch your first campaign to see it appear here.

showcase.title: What the Standard tier can create
showcase.desc: Posters generated by Jaarle, untouched — the AI picks the style, layout and colors that best suit your product.
showcase.imageAlt: Example Standard poster generated by Jaarle

cta.title: Ready to let everyone know about your product?
cta.desc: Create your first campaign in under a minute. No card required.

auth.registerDesc: Start creating your campaigns in minutes.
auth.whatsappHint: To receive your orders and notifications.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.desc: Update your details. Confirm with your current password to save.

creation.goldExtraPhotosHint: Different angles or contexts of the same product for a richer, more faithful result.
creation.servicePhotoHint: JPG, PNG — optional for a service, the AI can compose the visual from your description
creation.serviceDescriptionPlaceholder: E.g. Full interior and exterior cleaning, at home or in-shop.
creation.itemsAiHint: Leave blank and the AI will pick the most relevant highlights itself.
creation.priceOnRequest: Price on request (the client will contact you for pricing)
creation.imageFallbackNote: The AI image styling couldn't be generated for this creation. Here's your original photo — the copy below was still generated by AI.
creation.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this creation? This action cannot be undone.
creation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while uploading. Try again.
creation.errorGenerationUnclear: The connection dropped during generation. Check "My creations" before retrying — it may have been created anyway.
creation.errorMissingFields: Complete the required fields to continue.
creation.shareWhatsappHint: The WhatsApp button pre-fills the text — attach the downloaded poster before sending.
creation.paymentCanceled: Payment canceled. You can try again.
creation.paymentTimeout: Payment hasn't been confirmed yet. If you did pay, try again in a moment.
creation.galleryEmptyDesc: Launch your first campaign to see it appear here.

basic.name: Basic
basic.desc: Styled background, name, price and contact.

premium.name: Standard
premium.desc: Our most polished design, built for the wow effect.

gold.name: Advanced
gold.desc: Up to 3 photos and 2 design variations to choose from.

creation.declinationHint: Describe what you'd like different — otherwise the AI freely picks a style different from the 1st version.
creation.regenerateInstructionsLabel: What do you want to change? (optional)
creation.regenerateInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g. brighter background, more vivid colors, more minimalist style...
creation.contactPhone: Number to show on the poster
creation.contactPhoneHint: Pre-filled with your WhatsApp number. Edit it if you want to show a different number for this poster.
creation.brandingHint: Add your logo and/or business name to the poster.
